message:
feat(fsqlite-mvcc): add FCW conflict detection with GF(256) rebase + SharedPageLockTable tests (bd-3t3.8, bd-zppf)

bd-3t3.8: Added 8 unit + 1 E2E tests for SharedPageLockTable cross-process
exclusive locks (try_acquire, release key stability, linear probing,
load factor guard, crash cleanup, rolling rebuild).

bd-zppf: Implemented the First-Committer-Wins conflict detection and resolution
pipeline. Modified commit_concurrent to attempt GF(256) disjoint XOR merge
when WriteMergePolicy allows (not Off/AbortRetry). Added try_rebase_page
helper using version store base/theirs/ours delta composition. SSI
re-validation runs after successful rebase. Added 5 unit + 1 E2E tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
